evaluations.prompt: Audit path references in a plugin. Generate an inventory of all file references.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs path_reference_auditor.py --phase scan, which scans all plugins/skills directories, finds every ./reference pattern in code files, and generates inventory.json with source file, reference, and line number for each found reference.

evaluations.prompt: Verify that all path references actually exist in the filesystem.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs path_reference_auditor.py --phase verify, which reads inventory.json and checks if each reference exists. Updates inventory with status (exists/missing/symlink/broken) for each reference.

evaluations.prompt: Generate a report showing missing file references and broken symlinks.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs path_reference_auditor.py --phase report --report missing (or broken_symlinks), which reads verified inventory.json and displays human-readable report of violations without rescanning.

evaluations.prompt: Check if any references in skills point outside their skill directory.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs check_skill_boundaries.py inventory.json --batch all, which flags any ./reference in plugins/X/skills/Y/ that resolves outside of Y/. Should identify violations like ../../templates/file.md as pointing outside skill.

evaluations.prompt: Check if any references in plugin root files point outside the plugin.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs check_plugin_boundaries.py inventory.json --batch all, which flags any ./reference in plugins/X/ (non-skill files) that resolves outside of X/. Should identify violations like ../../project/file.md as pointing outside plugin.

evaluations.prompt: Quickly test a single skill without scanning all plugins.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs check_skill_boundaries.py inventory.json --skill adr-management, which filters inventory to only that skill and reports violations. Completes quickly for fast development testing.

evaluations.prompt: Quickly test a single plugin without scanning all plugins.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs check_plugin_boundaries.py inventory.json --plugin plugin-installer, which filters inventory to only that plugin and reports violations. Completes quickly for fast development testing.

evaluations.prompt: Report all symlinks found in the inventory.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs path_reference_auditor.py --phase report --report symlinks, which shows all references that resolve to symlinks, including their targets and whether targets are valid or broken.

evaluations.prompt: Run multiple checks without rescanning the inventory.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent can run check_skill_boundaries.py, check_plugin_boundaries.py, and path_reference_auditor.py --phase report multiple times against the same inventory.json without regenerating it. Inventory acts as persistent database.

evaluations.prompt: Find references to files that don't exist in the skill.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent identifies and reports all ./references in code that point to non-existent files. Shows which files/skills have dangling references that need to be created, symlinked, or removed.
